title: ISic003347. Fragment of a public inscription
body:
Text encoding: Alex Antoniou, Jonathan Prag
1Ὁ δᾶ[μος ---]

Text encoding: Alex Antoniou, Jonathan Prag
1ΟΔΑ[...---]

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text from photograph

English translation

Alex Antoniou

The people (of Tyndaris ...)

commentary

Gentili speculatively read this as a reference to an individual called Aristodamos or Kleodamos, but as Robert already observed, this must, surely, as in ISic003348, be a reference to the damos (and was so restored by Manganaro). As with ISic003348 it was found in re-use in a late antique element of the fortification walls.

bibliography

  • 1953.0277 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001282
  • Gentili 1952 164 no.1821 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001959
  • Manganaro 1965 203 no.1 tav.72.3 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001841
  • Fasolo 2013 58 no.4 fig.22 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002011

Neat, wide thinly incised monumental letters, omicron full size.

Line 1 75 Interlineation line 1 to 2
